title: RSRequestify: Reforged
description: RSRequestify: Reforged is an addon for Refined Storage that adds the Requester and Crafting Emitter from RS:Requestify to your Refined Storage in Minecraft 26.1+!
body:
RSRequestify: Reforged is an addon for [Refined Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/refined-storage) that adds the Requester and Crafting Emitter from [RS:Requestify](https://modrinth.com/mod/rs-requestify) to your Refined Storage in Minecraft 26.1+!

 

Requester: Keeps a specified amount of an item/fluid in stock in your Refined Storage.

Crafting Emitter: Emits a Redstone Signal when the specified amount of an item/fluid is being processed.

 

Originally made by [Buuz135](https://modrinth.com/user/buuz135), rewritten to work on Minecraft 26.1+ by me.
